hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>requires a body art facility that offers scarification to comply with certain requirements;<hr><ltbullet>establishes the criminal offense of unlawful scarification of a minor;<hr><ltbullet>requires the Office of Professional Licensure Review to review the practice of scarification; and<hr><ltbullet>defines terms.
